positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of intertwined celestial elements and delicate flora, featuring moons, constellations, stylized zodiac symbols, and curling botanicals. The design should be rendered in the aesthetic of a detailed etching or woodcut, utilizing strong black silhouettes against a crisp white background. The composition must be perfectly central, designed to wrap around a shirt, ensuring clean edges and maximum contrast for printing. Use deep indigo, gold leaf accents, and earthy sage tones sparingly for limited color depth. Minimalism, ornate, geometric, tattoo flash style, high contrast, vector art print quality.
